name: X-Golf South Loop
about: X-Golf South Loop is a golf simulator venue featuring 7 state-of-the-art simulators for indoor play, training, and entertainment. The facility offers hourly bay rentals, accommodating up to 6 people per simulator, with flexible pricing for weekdays and weekends. With a full bar, lounge area, pool table, and space for up to 200 guests, it combines golf simulation with a social atmosphere suitable for casual play, corporate events, and parties. The venue also provides PGA-certified instruction, club fitting services, and memberships for regular players.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Flexible pricing with 50% off daily promotions and membership options for regular players
Combination of golf simulation with a full bar, lounge, and event space for social play

food_and_drink.notes: Available food options include bites and packages, with prices ranging from $3-$10
Full bar with craft beer, wine, and cocktails; happy hour specials on weekdays (3PM-6PM)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and the venue offers Callaway and Taylormade equipment for fitting and use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed; the venue has a full bar and food menu available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. For groups, it takes 1 hour per person added.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, making it suitable for family visits and junior golfers.
